positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a steaming cup of coffee combined with a crescent moon and constellations. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, featuring clean, thick lines and a distressed tattoo-style black ink aesthetic. The main subject (coffee/moon constellation) must have excellent visual pop against a neutral, cream-colored background. Use a deep indigo and matte gold color palette for accents and highlights. High contrast, excellent readability for apparel printing, vector art quality, isolated on white background.
